messages.content:
paraphrase: It is our pleasure to deal with an educational institution such as the University College of Bahrain. The trial period will end at the end of the month of 1. In order to achieve the maximum benefit for researchers, we would like to hold a virtual workshop through MS Teams at the level of students and faculty members to learn more about the advantages of Al-Manhal and answer questions. All inquiries.

This workshop will be a great opportunity to expand knowledge of the Al Manhal database and learn how to use it to maximum benefit.

We are delighted to collaborate with the University College of Bahrain, an esteemed educational institution. The trial period will conclude at the end of the first month. To ensure researchers gain the most advantages from Al-Manhal, we propose conducting a virtual workshop via MS Teams. This workshop will cater to both students and faculty members, providing a comprehensive understanding of the benefits of Al-Manhal and addressing any queries they may have. Attending this workshop will be highly beneficial in enhancing expertise in utilizing the Al-Manhal database to its fullest potential.
paraphrase: Please note AlManhal already update all login details for AlManhal subscribers
Please be aware that AlManhal has already updated all login information for subscribers of AlManhal.
paraphrase: The decision was made to reset all admin passwords for all existing ALM subscribers due to increased malicious activity targeting administration accounts on the Al Manhal platforms.

In response to the heightened malicious activity targeting administrative accounts on the Al Manhal platforms, it has been determined that all admin passwords for existing ALM subscribers will be reset.
re
As a result of the increased malicious activity targeting administration accounts on the Al Manhal platforms, a decision has been made to reset the admin passwords for all current ALM subscribers.

paraphrase: First and foremost, allow me to introduce myself. I am <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>, your dedicated Customer Success Manager at AlManhal.

As a result of the increased malicious activity targeting administration accounts on the Al Manhal platforms, a decision has been made to reset the admin passwords for all current AlManhal subscribers.

The new credentials for Emory University is:

Username: almanhalemory
Password: /+(%8Qm2

Finally, I’d love to partner with you to run an online ALM training workshop for Faculty members and Students; so that we can expand their knowledge and help them get the most out of the platform. 
 
Looking forward to hearing from you on this topic.
 
All the best,

Let me begin by introducing myself, AbdelGhafoor AlSayyed, your dedicated Customer Success Manager at AlManhal.

Due to the increasing incidents of malicious activity targeting administration accounts on the Al Manhal platforms, a proactive decision has been made to reset the admin passwords for all current AlManhal subscribers.

Please find the new login credentials for Emory University below:

Username: almanhalemory
Password: /+(%8Qm2

Furthermore, I am excited to propose a collaboration with you to conduct an online ALM training workshop for both Faculty members and Students. This workshop aims to expand their knowledge about the platform and enable them to maximize its potential.

I am eagerly awaiting your response regarding this workshop.

Best regards,
Paraphrase: This is a confirmation that the email below is correct
We confirm that the email provided below is accurate.
paraphrase: We confirm that the email provided below is legitimate.
We verify that the email provided below is authentic.
re
We can confirm that the provided email below is valid and genuine.
re
We hereby confirm that the email mentioned below is legitimate and verified.

paraphrase: We confirm that the provided email below is genuine. Due to the increasing incidents of malicious activity targeting administration accounts on the Al Manhal platforms, a proactive decision has been made to reset the admin passwords for all current AlManhal subscribers.

We can verify the authenticity of the email provided below. In response to the growing number of security breaches targeting administration accounts on the Al Manhal platforms, a proactive measure has been implemented to reset the admin passwords for all existing AlManhal subscribers.
